title: Fisayo.org: Doors Held Open
excerpt: Fisayo.org is Alttene's giving-back initiative — sharing opportunities, honest guidance, and mentorship with the people coming up behind us.
content:
Every career has a moment where a door opened because someone held it. A scholarship you heard about just in time. A stranger who answered a cold email. A mentor who told you the unglamorous truth.

Fisayo.org exists to manufacture more of those moments.

What it does

  • Opportunities, shared. Scholarships, fellowships, jobs, and grants — curated and circulated so the right people hear about them while there's still time to apply.

  • Knowledge, out loud. Honest guides and talks about careers, studying abroad, and building things — the advice we wish someone had handed us.

  • Mentorship, on purpose. Connecting ambitious people with those a few steps ahead. (Sound familiar? Koffeechat's DNA is all over this.)

Why it lives inside a venture studio

Because giving back shouldn't be a retirement plan. Baking Fisayo.org into Alttene's structure means the studio's growth compounds into the community's growth — the better Koffeechat and Alto Partners do, the more doors we get to hold open.

Talent is everywhere. Access isn't. We're working on the second part.
author: Fisayo
